quote: Iran must make a deal, before there is nothing left, and save what was once known as the Iranian Empire.
summary: Hours after Israel's overnight 'Operation Rising Lion' strikes, Trump pressed Iran to deal and signaled support for more attacks.

quote: IRAN CAN NOT HAVE A NUCLEAR WEAPON. I said it over and over again! Everyone should immediately evacuate Tehran!
summary: From the G7 summit, Trump issued a sudden mass-evacuation warning for Tehran, then departed a day early.

quote: We now have complete and total control of the skies over Iran. … UNCONDITIONAL SURRENDER!
summary: Trump escalated in a cluster of posts — claiming air dominance, threatening Iran's Supreme Leader, demanding capitulation.

quote: I may do it. I may not do it. Nobody knows what I'm going to do.
summary: Asked whether the U.S. would strike Iran's nuclear sites, Trump kept the decision deliberately ambiguous.

quote: I will make my decision whether or not to go within the next two weeks.
summary: Trump signaled a roughly two-week window before deciding on direct U.S. action — markets were closed for Juneteenth.

quote: We have completed our very successful attack on the three Nuclear sites in Iran… NOW IS THE TIME FOR PEACE!
summary: Trump announced completed U.S. airstrikes ('Operation Midnight Hammer') on Iran's three main nuclear facilities.

quote: EVERYONE, KEEP OIL PRICES DOWN. I'M WATCHING! … DRILL, BABY, DRILL!!! And I mean NOW!!!
summary: With markets fearing an oil spike and a possible Strait of Hormuz closure, Trump pressured producers to hold prices and drill.

source: Event — Iranian strike on Al-Udeid Air Base, Qatar
summary: Iran's telegraphed, casualty-free retaliation: missiles were largely intercepted with advance warning, sparing oil infrastructure — and oil promptly collapsed.

quote: It has been fully agreed … that there will be a Complete and Total CEASEFIRE … an Official END to THE 12 DAY WAR.
summary: Trump unilaterally announced a phased Israel–Iran ceasefire, branding the conflict 'THE 12 DAY WAR.'

quote: We basically have two countries that have been fighting so long and so hard that they don't know what the f*** they're doing.
summary: Trump vented that both sides appeared to be violating his ceasefire, before leaving for the NATO summit.
